Siu loves the young people....

We don't have too many people like him. Treasure each of them !!

Siu is getting old day by day. Everything can happen at his age in health. Give him best wishes !! "Punish" his business.

Wish him long living!!!


It is perfectly OK to disagree on things, but he can still be a very well respected person !!

He may not be right each time .W No one can. BUT older folks like him have much more LIFE EXPERIENCE and knowledge in various areas. Younger people need to be humble and AT LEAST:
1) learn from him on the ways of critical thinking and approach an issue from various angles. This attitude can apply to everything in life and save lots of trouble.
2) NOT to shut him off, but at least listen to and analyze his points first. If young people listened to him, many arrests could be avoided especially on Poly.
